query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "dopd: dual on-policy distillation" computer science
rationale: This paper belongs in the literature review because it addresses the core mechanism of "Dual On-policy Distillation" by proposing a symmetric distillation framework that aligns intermediate thought processes, satisfying criteria (a) for same-mechanism evidence and (b) for measuring the same independent/dependent variables (distillation performance and alignment) in the LLM domain.
